startText: K Kitchen PERMIT 1 PHOTOS & NOTES Optional 2 REVIEW REPORT 3 OUTPUTS MENU FREE BUILDER NO LOGIN Free builder: no login, neutral test link, no company logo/contact, watermarked PDF, and no report history. FREE COMPANY LOCKED LOGIN PHOTOS & NOTES Create the restaurant-ready hood cleaning report. Add job photos if you have them. One short note is enough when the crew needs a clean report link and PDF for the restaurant. QUICK START PHOTOS OPTIONAL STEP 1 Add photos or notes Drop the phone batch if you have it. One written note is enough to start. STEP 2 Confirm what happened Pick the result and correct only the uncertain parts before sending. STEP 3 Share link or save PDF Use the customer link for delivery and the PDF copy for records. JOB PHOTOS Drop photos if you have them Before, after, fan, filter, access, label, and issue photos can all go in one batch. CHOOSE PHOTOS Photos optional Saved with report OPTIONAL NOTE WHAT WAS INCLUDED? Hood cleaning Hood, duct, fan, and grease path expected. Leave standard unless this visit was filters-only, fan-only, access revisit, or condition-only. THIS VISIT ONLY STANDARD HOOD + FAN FILTERS ONLY FAN ONLY ACCESS REVISIT CONDITION ONLY NO PHOTOS? Review written record Create the written service record first, then fix only wrong or uncertain parts. NEXT No photos is okay. The next screen creates a written record without claiming missing photos. REVIEW RECORD
outputsText: K Kitchen PERMIT 1 PHOTOS & NOTES 2 REVIEW REPORT 3 OUTPUTS Ready MENU FREE BUILDER NO LOGIN Free builder: no login, neutral test link, no company logo/contact, watermarked PDF, and no report history. FREE COMPANY LOCKED LOGIN OUTPUTS READY Customer written record is ready. WHAT HAPPENS NEXT Written service record: condition found with follow-up action visible. COMPANY VERSION UNLOCKS Same report, but client-ready and saved to your account. LOCKED IN FREE BRAND THIS REPORT Logo, phone, and reply email on the customer link. CLEAN PDF No FREE TEST COPY watermark on the retained PDF. RETAINED CUSTOMER LINKS Paid report links and PDFs stay available after creation. REPORT HISTORY Saved customers, reports, and follow-up. REMOVE WATERMARK & BRAND THIS REPORT GENERATED FROM SELECTED RESULT Customer report, PDF, and follow-up outputs generated Service report link, PDF copy, revisit or quote copy, and next-service text are derived from this same vendor-confirmed service record. 4 READY 1 REVIEW 4 CHECKS Copy customer link Customer link from this service record. Save service report PDF PDF record from the same service record. SERVICE AREAS Change status here; every output updates from the same service record. Hood / filters WRITTEN ONLY NOTES Completed + photo Completed, no photo Blocked / no access Not completed Condition only Not part of this job Duct / access path WRITTEN ONLY NOTES Completed + photo Completed, no photo Blocked / no access Not completed Condition only Not part of this job Rooftop fan WRITTEN ONLY NOTE Completed + photo Completed, no photo Blocked / no access Not completed Condition only Not part of this job Grease path WRITTEN ONLY NOTES Completed + photo Completed, no photo Blocked / no access Not completed Condition only Not part of this job OUTPUT ITEMS One service record, multiple customer, PDF, revisit, quote, and next-service uses. Service report link Generated from the vendor-confirmed result, photo coverage, and next action. Written completed areas: Hood / filters, Duct / access path, Grease path. Condition areas: Rooftop fan. READY PDF copy Uses the same service record as the service report link in a retained document layout. Written completed areas: Hood / filters, Duct / access path, Grease path. Condition areas: Rooftop fan. This is a written service record; photo evidence is not attached to this visit. Recorded conditions and follow-up paths are separate from this cleaning record. READY Follow-up quote copy Use only for recorded condition areas: Rooftop fan. Rooftop fan was recorded as a condition area, separate from the completed cleaning closeout. Use this note for quote follow-up before adding separate corrective work. READY Revisit copy No blocked or not-completed area is recorded. N/A Next-service copy Next service copy follows the selected cadence and customer action. Review the noted condition and reply if you want a follow-up quote before the next service window. READY Vendor send check 4 send check(s) remain before using this as a completed record. No field photos attached. This will generate a written service record, not photo-supported completion language. REVIEW NEXT CLEANING / FOLLOW-UP Turns the same service record into rebook, revisit, quote, or monitor action. Schedule next cleaning Clear access or follow-up before using normal rebook copy. REVIEW Schedule revisit after access is clear No revisit request is needed for the current result. N/A Send follow-up quote Condition follow-up can become quote copy from this record. READY Monitor condition Keep the condition visible for the next service cycle. N/A CUSTOMER LINK PREVIEW TEST OUTPUT Unbranded customer test link from this job Free mode creates a neutral 7-day test link. The customer sees a test report without your company logo, contact line, or saved history. Current mode: No company logo/contact, 7-day test link, Watermarked PDF, No report history. Free limit: neutral customer link, visible test watermark, and no saved report history. COMPANY VERSION UNLOCKS Same report, but client-ready and saved to your account. LOCKED IN FREE BRAND THIS REPORT Logo, phone, and reply email on the customer link. CLEAN PDF No FREE TEST COPY watermark on the retained PDF. RETAINED CUSTOMER LINKS Paid report links and PDFs stay available after creation. REPORT HISTORY Saved customers, reports, and follow-up. Completed: Hood canopy and filters, Reachable plenum, duct path, and access, Grease path and containment. No blocked, incomplete, or separate area is shown as completed. Recorded for follow-up: Rooftop fan and roof discharge. Condition recorded from service note, no condition photo is attached. This is a written service record, so photos are not implied. RESULT Review item DOCUMENTATION Condition record CUSTOMER ACTION Request quote PDF COPY Record copy Save PDF copy Use your normal customer communication channel to confirm this step. DOCUMENTATION Written condition record PDF COPY Record copy for archive, submission, or print. CUSTOMER NEXT STEP Review the noted condition and contact the service team if you want a follow-up quote before the next service window. WHAT THIS SERVICE COVERED Hood canopy and filters Reachable plenum, duct path, and access Rooftop fan and roof discharge Grease path and containment Completed: Hood canopy and filters, Reachable plenum, duct path, and access, Grease path and containment. No blocked, incomplete, or separate area is shown as completed. Recorded for follow-up: Rooftop fan and roof discharge. Condition recorded from service note, no condition photo is attached. This is a written service record, so photos are not implied. Recorded for follow-up: Rooftop fan and roof discharge. Condition recorded from service note, no condition photo is attached. This is a written service record, so photos are not implied. Rooftop fan hinge is worn and should be reviewed before the next quarterly service. This area is not listed as cleaned until the follow-up condition is cleared. EDIT CUSTOMER ACTION Review condition for quote Review the noted condition and contact the service team if you want a follow-up quote before the next service window. EDIT RECORD NOTE Keep the PDF copy with kitchen exhaust files. The PDF copy is for manager, insurance, or documentation requests. It stays separate from corrective or follow-up work.
